I think the easiest way to explain it is that if Unit 1, 2, 3 was available on the property website today, it would fall under the available units bucket.
If tomorrow unit 1, 2, 3 was gone from the property website, we would assume that somebody put in an application on that unit.
And then, if that unit does not reappear in the property website within 7 days, meaning there wasn't a relisted unit, or a cancellation or denial, then it becomes a lease.
So that's the science behind how we're reporting some of these metrics right here.
